title: Aurora, 32791, Fancy Pal, Peek-A-Boo Princess Kitty, 8In, Soft Toy, Pink and White, 14 cm
features: Part of Aurora’s highly popular Fancy Pals Pet Carrier Collection
Soft and extremely cuddly pet carrier bag & soft toy made with high quality materials
Princess Kitty soft toy can be removed from the bag, so there are two gifts in one
Children will love this cute and hugely collectible animal.
description: From the manufacturer Fancy Pal, Peek-A-Boo Princess Kitty Aurora’s Fancy Pal Peek-A-Boo Princess Kitty Pet Carrier. This is a gorgeous sparkly pink pet carrier bag with a soft and white Kitten wearing crown inside. Aurora World has with over 40 years of experience in designing and manufacturing innovative and high quality plush products.
